name: tier-b/dotnet/01-sln-multiple-projects-positive
description: Positive case: Solution.sln with 3 Project() entries pointing to 3 .csproj files in distinct subdirectories.

manifests.Solution.sln:
Microsoft Visual Studio Solution File, Format Version 12.00
Project("{FAE04EC0-301F-11D3-BF4B-00C04F79EFBC}") = "A", "src/A/A.csproj", "{11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111}"
EndProject
Project("{FAE04EC0-301F-11D3-BF4B-00C04F79EFBC}") = "B", "src/B/B.csproj", "{22222222-2222-2222-2222-222222222222}"
EndProject
Project("{FAE04EC0-301F-11D3-BF4B-00C04F79EFBC}") = "C", "src/C/C.csproj", "{33333333-3333-3333-3333-333333333333}"
EndProject
